Package neqsim.process.materials

Class MaterialsReviewInput

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.materials.MaterialsReviewInput
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MaterialsReviewInput extends Object implements Serializable
Normalized input for a process-wide materials review.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • fromJson

      public static MaterialsReviewInput fromJson(String json)
      Parses input from JSON.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON string with items, materialsRegister, stidData, or process-derived items
      Returns:
      parsed review input

    • fromJsonObject

      public static MaterialsReviewInput fromJsonObject(com.google.gson.JsonObject object)
      Parses input from a JSON object.
      Parameters:
      object - JSON object to parse
      Returns:
      parsed review input

    • fromProcessSystem

      public static MaterialsReviewInput fromProcessSystem(ProcessSystem process)
      Creates review input from a simulated process system.

      The method extracts equipment names, equipment classes, pressure, temperature, and selected component mole fractions. A materials register can later be merged by tag to add material grade, wall thickness, coating, insulation, and inspection data.

      Parameters:
      process - process system to inspect
      Returns:
      review input containing one item per unit operation

    • setProjectName

      public MaterialsReviewInput setProjectName(String projectName)
      Sets the project name.
      Parameters:
      projectName - project or asset name
      Returns:
      this input for fluent construction

      Returns:

      private static double getComponentFraction(SystemInterface fluid, String componentName)
      Reads a component overall mole fraction safely.
      Parameters:
      fluid - thermo system
      componentName - component name
      Returns:
      overall mole fraction or zero
